title: CSKA
description: Sneaker customization with CSKA club branding. Limited gifts for VIPs and top management of the club — unique branded merch.

details.task: Create branded sneakers with CSKA branding for VIP club gifts.
details.solution: Hand-painted sneakers, club branding, heat-transfer prints, DTF film, lace replacement.
details.result: Branded custom sneakers — a limited gift for the club's VIPs.
